install_fields.label: Personal Access Token
install_fields.help: GitHub Personal Access Token (classic) or fine-grained PAT. From GitHub → Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens.

install_fields.label: Organization (optional)
install_fields.help: Optional. GitHub organization slug for org-level repository access. Leave blank for user-level access.

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate api_key by calling GET /user. Returns HEALTHY + CONNECTED on success.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping GET /user and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE. Includes authenticated username.

methods.name: Sync Records
methods.description: Full sync of GitHub repositories, issues, and pull requests into the knowledge base.

methods.name: List Repositories
methods.description: List all repositories accessible by the authenticated user, or org repos when org is set.

methods.name: Get Repository
methods.description: Retrieve a single repository by owner and name.

methods.name: List Issues
methods.description: List issues for a repository, filtered by state.

methods.name: Get Issue
methods.description: Retrieve a single issue by number.

methods.name: List Pull Requests
methods.description: List pull requests for a repository, filtered by state.

methods.name: Get Pull Request
methods.description: Retrieve a single pull request by number.

methods.name: List Members
methods.description: List members of a GitHub organization.
